title: Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata
text: infoepi.NGOdata package provides tools processing IRS Form 990 nonprofit data. article shows get started core functionality.

title: Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata
code: # Install from local source (development version) # install.packages(".", repos = NULL, type = "source")  library(infoepi.NGOdata)

title: Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata

what: 2. Parse a single Form 990 XML file
title: Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata
code: xml_file <- "path/to/your/990.xml"  ein <- peek_filing_ein(xml_file) print(paste("EIN:", ein))  filing_data <- parse_990_xml(xml_file) str(filing_data, max.level = 2)

title: Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata
code: board_df <- board_members_to_tibble(filing_data$board_members) print(board_df)  comp_summary <- compensation_summary(board_df) print(comp_summary)  top_paid <- top_compensated(board_df, n = 5) print(top_paid)

title: Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata
code: grants_df <- foreign_grants_to_tibble(filing_data$foreign_grants) print(grants_df)  regional_grants <- grants_by_region(grants_df) print(regional_grants)  country_grants <- grants_by_country(grants_df) print(country_grants)

title: Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata
code: irs_export_csv(board_df, "board_members.csv") irs_export_csv(grants_df, "foreign_grants.csv")  irs_export_json(filing_data, "full_filing.json")  summary_data <- irs_export_filing_summary(filing_data) print(summary_data)

title: Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata
code: args <- list(   eins = c("123456789", "987654321"),   years_str = "2020-2022",   fetch = TRUE,   do_parse = TRUE,   analyze = TRUE,   output = "results" )  # run_irs990_pipeline(args)

title: Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata
code: safe_parse <- function(xml_path) {   tryCatch(     parse_990_xml(xml_path),     error = function(e) {       message("Failed to parse: ", xml_path)       message("Error: ", e$message)       return(NULL)     }   ) }  xml_files <- c("file1.xml", "file2.xml", "file3.xml") results <- lapply(xml_files, safe_parse) results <- results[!sapply(results, is.null)]

title: Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata
text: See function reference full API. Home Get Started site.

title: Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata
text: Use ?function_name help specific functions. Report issues: https://github.com/infoepi-lab/irs-data/issues.

what: Full pipeline: fetch, parse, analyze, export — run_irs990_pipeline
title: Full pipeline: fetch, parse, analyze, export — run_irs990_pipeline
text: Full pipeline: fetch, parse, analyze, export

title: Full pipeline: fetch, parse, analyze, export — run_irs990_pipeline
code: run_irs990_pipeline(   eins = character(),   ein_file = NULL,   years = 2017:2025,   fetch = TRUE,   parse = TRUE,   analyze = TRUE,   output_dir = NULL,   full = FALSE,   project_root = NULL,   paths = NULL )  run_irs990_pipeline_cli(argv = commandArgs(trailingOnly = TRUE))

title: Full pipeline: fetch, parse, analyze, export — run_irs990_pipeline
text: eins Character vector 9-digit EINs (dashes required). ein_file Optional path text file (one EIN per line, # comments ok). years Integer vector IRS index years. fetch, parse, analyze Logical toggles. output_dir Override paths$output_dir. full TRUE, sets fetch, parse, analyze TRUE. project_root Repo root irs_project_paths(). paths Optional pre-built paths list. argv Character vector command line arguments CLI version

title: infoepi.NGOdata 0.1.0
text: Initial release IRS Form 990 data processing package Data acquisition functions IRS bulk data downloads XML parsing capabilities Form 990 filings (Part VII, Schedule F) Board member analysis governance structure tools Foreign grants international activities processing Export utilities CSV, JSON formats Cross-platform support (Windows, macOS, Linux)

title: infoepi.NGOdata 0.1.0
text: Comprehensive test suite testthat Continuous integration GitHub Actions Code coverage reporting codecov Professional package structure following R standards

title: infoepi.NGOdata 0.1.0
text: irs_download_index() - Download IRS bulk data indexes irs_fetch_eins_for_year() - Fetch EINs specific years irs_smart_fetch() - Intelligent data fetching caching

title: infoepi.NGOdata 0.1.0
text: parse_990_xml() - Main Form 990 XML parser peek_filing_ein() - Quick EIN extraction files Robust error handling validation

title: infoepi.NGOdata 0.1.0
text: board_members_to_tibble() - Convert board data tidy format board_tenure_analysis() - Analyze board member tenure compensation_summary() - Executive compensation analysis cross_board_membership() - Multi-organization board connections

title: infoepi.NGOdata 0.1.0
text: foreign_grants_to_tibble() - Process foreign grant data grants_by_region() - Regional grant distribution purpose_categories() - Grant purpose classification

title: infoepi.NGOdata 0.1.0
text: irs_export_csv() - Export CSV format irs_export_json() - Export JSON format irs_export_full_analysis() - Complete analysis export run_irs990_pipeline() - End--end pipeline execution
